description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean lines and a flat roof. The exterior is clad in a combination of wood paneling and smooth gray surfaces, creating a striking contrast. Large windows and glass doors are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, allowing for ample natural light. The property includes multiple outdoor terraces with lush greenery and seating areas, as well as a prominent swimming pool that wraps around two sides of the building. The landscaping is minimalistic, with a few strategically placed trees and shrubs flanking the entrance. The overall aesthetic is contemporary and luxurious, suitable for an upscale urban neighborhood.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with wood and gray paneling, large windows, multiple terraces, and a wraparound swimming pool.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance with steps, flanked by trees, and a large pool in front of the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the pool extending along the side, asymmetrical window placement, and rooftop greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals a solid wood-paneled wall with a single window and the pool extending across the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays more windows, the pool, and landscaped areas with trees and shrubs.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, flanked by trees, no porch, and a minimalist modern door.
